data.title: Curaleaf Launches US$83 Million Share Repurchase Program Approved by TSX
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Curaleaf Holdings ( (TSE:CURA) ).

On April 16, 2026, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. announced that its board had authorized, and the Toronto Stock Exchange approved, a normal course issuer bid to repurchase up to 34,388,831 subordinate voting shares, about 5% of those outstanding as of April 10, 2026. The buyback, with an implied fair market value of roughly US$83 million based on the April 14 TSX closing price, will run from April 20, 2026 to no later than April 19, 2027 and all repurchased shares will be cancelled.

Management framed the move as a way to return capital to shareholders and signal confidence in the company’s strategy, noting that the stock may at times trade below its perceived intrinsic value. Conducted through the TSX and eligible Canadian alternative trading systems via designated broker ATB Cormark Capital Markets, the program gives Curaleaf flexibility on timing and volume within regulatory limits and marks its first normal course issuer bid in the past 12 months, potentially tightening its float and supporting earnings per share over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CURA) stock is a Buy with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Curaleaf Holdings stock, see the TSE:CURA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CURA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CURA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by persistent net losses, margin compression, and weak technical trends (negative MACD and trading below key moving averages). Offsetting factors include improving cash generation and management’s operational progress and de-risking actions discussed on the earnings call (notably cash flow strength and refinancing), but near-term revenue softness and continued pricing pressure limit upside.

To see Spark’s full report on CURA stock, click here.

More about Curaleaf Holdings

Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. is a leading international provider of consumer cannabis products, serving both medical and adult-use markets under brands such as Curaleaf, Select, Grassroots, Find, Dark Heart and Anthem. Listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and trading on the OTCQX, the company operates across Europe, Canada and Australasia with an integrated supply chain spanning cultivation, extraction, production and distribution.

Average Trading Volume: 549,981

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$2.79B

Learn more about CURA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: HNO International Raises Capital via Convertible Note Financings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from HNO International ( (HNOI) ).

On April 7 and April 9, 2026, HNO International raised capital through two separate private placements of convertible promissory notes and common stock purchase warrants with Jefferson Street Capital and Lambda Ventures, each providing gross proceeds of $87,500 and approximately $82,250 in net cash to the company. The transactions feature steeply discounted conversion pricing tied to the company’s market price, significant share reservations totaling 26,000,000 common shares, strict default and market-cap covenants, and participation and issuance restrictions that collectively increase the risk of future dilution for existing shareholders while securing short-term funding flexibility.

In the Jefferson Street Capital deal, HNO issued a $96,250 note with an original issue discount and a one-time 8% interest charge, convertible at 60% of the lowest traded price over a 20-day lookback, alongside a five-year warrant for 385,000 shares at $0.25, all subject to a 4.99% ownership cap. HNO also reserved 13,000,000 shares for conversions and warrant exercises, agreed to maintain a minimum market capitalization and reporting compliance, and granted Jefferson Street participation rights in future financings while temporarily restricting other share issuances.

Under the Lambda Ventures agreement on April 9, 2026, HNO issued a second $96,250 note on substantially similar terms, including the 60% discount conversion formula, 8% one-time interest, and a 12‑month maturity, as well as a five-year warrant for 385,000 shares at $0.25 with a 4.99% ownership limit. The company again irrevocably reserved 13,000,000 shares for this financing, reinforcing the likelihood of material equity issuance over time as the notes convert and the warrants are exercised, and underscoring HNO’s reliance on high‑discount convertible structures to meet near-term capital needs.

More about HNO International

HNO International, Inc. is a publicly traded company that issues common stock and uses convertible debt financing to fund its operations. The company accesses capital markets through private placements with accredited investors, focusing on securities such as convertible promissory notes and common stock purchase warrants to support its ongoing business activities.

Average Trading Volume: 15,190

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $9.16M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Silvercorp Metals ( (TSE:SVM) ) has provided an announcement.

Silvercorp Metals reported record revenue for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, with Q4 revenue rising 96% year over year to about $147.4 million and full-year revenue up 47% to roughly $438.1 million. Despite higher ore throughput and stronger gold output, silver, lead and zinc production declined in several operations due to lower grades, while the company advanced construction at its Kuanping and El Domo projects, exceeded its annual ore processing guidance, secured an MSCI ESG rating upgrade to AA, and set out production, cost and capital expenditure guidance for fiscal 2027, with audited fiscal 2026 results scheduled for release on May 25, 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SVM) stock is a Buy with a C$21.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Silvercorp Metals stock, see the TSE:SVM Stock Forecast page.

Earnings call commentary was supportive overall, highlighting strong operational/cash results and project progress despite guidance and grade risks.

data.description:

Fortuna Mining Corp ( (TSE:FVI) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 17, 2026, Fortuna Mining Corp. said its board had renewed the company’s normal course issuer bid, authorizing the repurchase of up to 15,227,869 common shares, or 5% of the 304,557,387 shares outstanding as of April 10, 2026. The program will run from May 4, 2026, until the earlier of May 3, 2027, the purchase of the maximum authorized amount, or a board decision to halt repurchases.

Buybacks will be carried out through the New York Stock Exchange under U.S. and Canadian rules, with all repurchased shares to be cancelled, and will be supported by both an instructed and an automatic share purchase plan with a designated broker. Management said the stock sometimes trades below its underlying value and framed the renewed bid—following a prior NCIB under which 3.4 million shares had been repurchased by April 16, 2026 at an average US$9.53—as a flexible tool to deploy discretionary cash within financial guardrails and enhance shareholder value.

The company focuses on gold and silver production and emphasizes sustainability, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility in its operations and stakeholder relations.

Its strategy centers on efficient production and creating long-term shared value across its asset base in Latin America and West Africa. Fortuna positions itself as a growth-oriented miner, balancing capital allocation between mine development, exploration, and returning capital to shareholders within defined financial guardrails.

data.title: Aris Mining Hits Key Underground Development Milestone at Marmato Mine
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aris Mining ( (TSE:ARIS) ) has issued an update.

On April 17, 2026, Aris Mining reported a key construction milestone at its Marmato gold mine in Colombia, where an underground development cross-cut has now linked the new surface decline with existing underground workings. This connection creates continuous access from surface, where a 5,000 tonne-per-day CIP processing plant is being built, to the current mine, enabling the next phases of mine development, infrastructure installation, and operational readiness for the planned Marmato bulk mining operation.

Management said the project remains on schedule for first gold from the new Marmato bulk mine in the fourth quarter of 2026, supporting the company’s plan for combined annual production of roughly 500,000 ounces from Marmato and Segovia following expansion and ramp-up. The breakthrough underscores Marmato’s role as a core growth asset that will transform it into a larger-scale, modern underground operation and marks continued progress toward Aris Mining’s broader production growth objectives in the region.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ARIS) stock is a Buy with a C$41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aris Mining stock, see the TSE:ARIS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARIS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARIS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance and a positive earnings outlook with meaningful production growth guidance, supported by strong technical uptrend signals. These positives are partially offset by expensive valuation and key risks around cash-flow durability and capital intensity required to execute the growth pipeline.

To see Spark’s full report on ARIS stock, click here.

Listed on the Toronto and New York stock exchanges under the symbol ARIS, the company produced about 257,000 ounces of gold in 2025 and is advancing expansion projects aimed at significantly increasing its annual production profile.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

An announcement from SRx Health Solutions ( (SRXH) ) is now available.

On April 17, 2026, SRx Health Solutions and EMJ Crypto Technologies released a shareholder letter detailing operational progress and the status of their proposed merger, which was first announced in December 2025. EMJX highlighted strong early performance from its second-generation digital-asset treasury hedging strategy, including a 5.69% return in March 2026 versus a 4.98% decline in the S&P 500 and additional gains through mid-April, underscoring its claim of institutional-grade, risk-managed digital treasury capabilities.

The update framed EMJX as a treasury operating system rather than a traditional fund, contrasting its rules-based, multi-asset, hedged approach with earlier single-asset digital treasury models that exposed shareholders to greater volatility and dilution. Management disclosed that SRx had recently expanded treasury deployment into listed equities such as Compass Inc. and Opendoor Technologies Inc., and confirmed that a Form S-4 registration statement for the merger had been filed with the SEC, signaling regulatory review is underway and reinforcing management’s confidence that the transaction, once completed, will underpin long-term value creation for shareholders as EMJX becomes a wholly owned subsidiary.

Spark’s Take on SRXH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRXH is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses, cash burn, and high leverage). Corporate events are mixed—added funding and preferred redemption help, but the NYSE compliance warning is a material risk—while technicals show only modest near-term improvement and valuation remains unattractive due to ongoing losses and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on SRXH stock, click here.

More about SRx Health Solutions

SRx Health Solutions, Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the ticker SRXH, is pursuing a strategic shift through a definitive merger agreement with EMJ Crypto Technologies, a digital-asset treasury operating platform. EMJX positions itself as a second-generation, institutional-grade system for multi-asset digital treasury management, emphasizing quantitative models, artificial intelligence and systematic risk controls for corporate and investment treasuries.

The combined entity is targeting the growing market for disciplined digital-asset treasury solutions, differentiating itself from earlier, single-asset, price-appreciation-focused models that lacked robust risk management. By operating EMJX as a wholly owned subsidiary post-merger and appointing EMJX founder Eric M. Jackson as an officer of the subsidiary, SRx aims to embed this Gen2 treasury framework at the core of its capital allocation and growth strategy.

The latest announcement is out from Auna S.A. Class A ( (AUNA) ).

On April 17, 2026, Auna S.A. released preliminary key performance indicators for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, detailing volumes across its Mexican, Peruvian, and Colombian operations. The disclosure, which the company plans to repeat each quarter, signals a push toward greater transparency for investors by providing regular visibility into trends in emergency treatments, surgeries, hospital days, capacity utilization, oncology sessions, and plan memberships, offering a more granular view of operating momentum beyond headline financials.

The first-quarter data show steady or rising utilization in several key areas, including higher capacity use in Peru and Colombia and continued growth in Peru’s OncoSalud plan memberships and Colombia’s protected lives, underscoring the scale of Auna’s patient base. These metrics indicate that core service lines remain active and that its subscription-style health products are expanding, which may support perceptions of operational resilience and recurring revenue potential among shareholders and bondholders monitoring the company’s regional growth trajectory.

data.description:

Graphex Group ADR ( (GRFXY) ) just unveiled an update.

Graphex Group Limited has moved to voluntarily terminate its sponsored American Depositary Shares programme in the United States, where its ADSs currently trade on the OTC Expert Market under the symbol GRFXY. The decision follows years of declining U.S. listing status, including the May 2025 delisting of its ADSs from NYSE American and their migration to over-the-counter trading.

On April 10, 2026, the company instructed The Bank of New York Mellon to end the deposit agreement, and the depositary notified ADS holders on April 16, 2026 that the programme will terminate on July 14, 2026. Investors have until at least July 17, 2026 to surrender ADSs for the underlying Hong Kong–listed ordinary shares, after which the depositary may sell remaining shares and remit net proceeds, while Graphex will focus its listing and fundraising activities on its primary Hong Kong market.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GRFXY is a Neutral.

Graphex Group ADR’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its weak financial performance and poor valuation metrics. The technical analysis further indicates bearish momentum, with the stock trading below key moving averages and nearing oversold conditions. To see Spark’s full report on GRFXY stock, click here.

More about Graphex Group ADR

Graphex Group Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company (HKSE: 6128) whose ordinary shares trade on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. data.title: Lyra Therapeutics Ends Major Office Sublease Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Lyra Therapeutics ( (LYRA) ).

On April 13, 2026, Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. agreed with RVAC Medicines (US), Inc. to terminate its sublease for about 23,704 rentable square feet at 880 Winter Street in Waltham, Massachusetts, originally signed on December 21, 2023. The sublease termination was effective as of March 31, 2026, with Lyra required to vacate the premises by May 31, 2026.

As part of the termination, Lyra will pay RVAC a $2.1 million termination fee, while its rent obligations ended on January 31, 2026. Upon Lyra completing its surrender obligations and making the termination payment, RVAC will return the company’s $600,501.32 letter of credit security deposit, adjusting Lyra’s near-term cash flows and real estate commitments.

The most recent analyst rating on (LYRA) stock is a Hold with a $16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lyra Therapeutics stock, see the LYRA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LYRA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LYRA is a Underperform.

The score is driven primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal/declining revenue, persistent losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity) alongside a strongly bearish technical trend. Corporate events add significant risk due to delisting and the pivot to a shell/strategic-alternatives posture, while valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on LYRA stock, click here.

More about Lyra Therapeutics

Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for ear, nose and throat diseases, operating from leased and subleased office and laboratory space in the U.S. The company manages its real estate footprint as part of its broader effort to align operating costs with its development and commercialization plans.

Average Trading Volume: 72,090

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.17M

data.title: Vaxart Secures Flexible $25 Million Equity Purchase Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Vaxart ( (VXRT) ).

On April 16, 2026, Vaxart, Inc. entered into a purchase agreement and related registration rights agreement with Lincoln Park Capital Fund, under which Lincoln Park committed to buy up to $25 million of Vaxart common stock over a 24‑month period, subject to specified conditions and a 4.99% ownership cap. Vaxart issued 447,067 shares as commitment consideration, and any additional sales will rely on an effective SEC registration statement and will be priced at formula-based discounts to prevailing market prices, with no warrants, rights of first refusal or participation rights attached.

The structure gives Vaxart sole discretion over the timing and size of stock sales, including potential regular and accelerated purchases, while obligating Lincoln Park to buy shares and prohibiting it from short selling or hedging the stock. The company expects to use any proceeds for working capital, capital expenditures and general corporate purposes, framing the facility as a flexible way to strengthen its balance sheet and support the advancement of its oral vaccine programs without immediately diluting shareholders through a large, one‑time equity raise.

The most recent analyst rating on (VXRT) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vaxart stock, see the VXRT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VXRT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VXRT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (TTM profitability and positive cash flow) and constructive earnings-call factors (partnership validation, strong 2025 revenue, and runway extension), tempered by concerns about durability given contract-driven revenue and historical volatility. Technical signals are mixed and do not currently indicate strong near-term momentum, while valuation looks supportive but depends on earnings sustainability.

To see Spark’s full report on VXRT stock, click here.

More about Vaxart

Vaxart, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing oral recombinant vaccines delivered in pill form using its proprietary platform. Its pipeline targets coronavirus, norovirus and influenza prevention, as well as a therapeutic human papillomavirus vaccine, with a focus on room‑temperature stable, needle‑free products supported by broad patent filings.

Vaxart’s pill-based vaccines are designed to simplify storage, shipping and administration versus traditional injectable vaccines. The company aims to create oral versions of existing vaccines and new candidates for emerging indications, positioning itself within the competitive global vaccines market.

Average Trading Volume: 513,121

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $175.5M

data.title: Tri Pointe Clears Key Antitrust Hurdle in Sumitomo Merger
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Tri Pointe ( (TPH) ).

Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. reported that the mandatory waiting period under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act for its proposed merger with Japan’s Sumitomo Forestry Co., Ltd. expired at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on April 16, 2026. This expiration satisfies a key U.S. antitrust condition for the deal, in which a Sumitomo subsidiary will merge into Tri Pointe, leaving Tri Pointe as the surviving corporation and an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of the Japanese parent.

The merger remains subject to other closing conditions, including those outlined in the companies’ merger agreement, so completion is not yet assured. The company also highlighted a range of risks that could affect the transaction’s outcome, including potential delays, termination scenarios, litigation, supply chain pressures and broader macroeconomic and trade-related headwinds that could influence its operations and deal execution.

The most recent analyst rating on (TPH) stock is a Hold with a $47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tri Pointe stock, see the TPH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TPH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TPH is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by stable but weakening fundamentals (notably the sharp 2025 cash flow decline and margin compression), offset by a healthy balance sheet and a reasonable P/E. The announced all-cash acquisition at a premium is a major positive near-term factor, while technicals show strong trend but overbought conditions that add pullback risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TPH stock, click here.

More about Tri Pointe

Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. is a U.S.-based homebuilder operating in the residential construction industry, focused on delivering new homes and growing its community count under the Tri Pointe Homes brand. The company targets homebuyers across various U.S. markets, emphasizing home deliveries, home sales and brand expansion within the competitive homebuilding sector.

Average Trading Volume: 2,920,450

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.98B

data.title: Forum Markets Launches Share Buyback and Strategic Review
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Forum Markets ( (FRMM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 17, 2026, Forum Markets announced board-approved measures intended to close the gap between its market capitalization and its view of the firm’s intrinsic value. The company disclosed that on April 15, 2026 its board unanimously reinitiated a share repurchase program, authorizing buybacks at volumes that may exceed typical safe-harbor limits as a direct signal of confidence in the business and its current valuation.

The board also formed a special committee of independent directors to evaluate a wide spectrum of strategic options, including mergers or acquisitions of aligned private companies, a potential sale of the company or key assets, new capital partnerships, or a substantial return of capital to shareholders if no other proposal meets valuation thresholds. In parallel, Forum retained Clear Street Investment Banking as independent financial adviser to provide valuation analysis and help source and assess potential transactions while management continues to pursue revenue and cash-flow growth under the existing business plan.

The most recent analyst rating on (FRMM) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Forum Markets stock, see the FRMM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FRMM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FRMM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (massive net losses and ongoing cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (price below all key moving averages with negative momentum). Corporate events provide some upside optionality through new yield-focused lending initiatives, but valuation support is limited given negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on FRMM stock, click here.

More about Forum Markets

Forum Markets, Incorporated (Nasdaq: FRMM) is a digital asset platform focused on modernizing capital markets through the tokenization of institutional-grade, cash-generating real-world assets. The company brings these assets onto blockchain-based infrastructure to unlock liquidity, expand investor access, and improve efficiency in both primary issuance and secondary trading by integrating traditional asset management with scalable digital market architecture.

Forum structures real-world value so it can be originated, accessed, and traded on-chain, positioning itself at the intersection of asset management and digital markets. Its model targets institutional-quality assets and seeks to use tokenization to broaden participation while maintaining capital markets discipline and regulatory awareness.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $43.27M

data.title: Virtus Investment Partners Updates Non-GAAP Reporting Framework
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Virtus Investment Partners ( (VRTS) ) has issued an announcement.

Virtus Investment Partners said it will revise certain non-GAAP financial measures beginning with its first-quarter 2026 results to include tax benefits realized from the amortization of goodwill and intangible assets, which had previously been excluded. The change will lower the reported non-GAAP effective tax rate and increase adjusted diluted earnings per share and adjusted net income for past and future periods, with management arguing the new definitions better capture the economic impact of acquisition-driven tax assets and provide investors with a clearer view of underlying performance without altering previously filed GAAP results.

To support comparability, the firm is publishing supplemental reconciliations for the first quarter of 2024 through the fourth quarter of 2025, plus full-year 2024 and 2025, showing how the revised metrics differ from the historical non-GAAP calculations. The updated framework continues to strip out items such as non-cash amortization, restructuring costs, acquisition and integration expenses, deferred compensation volatility and seed-capital investment gains or losses, while emphasizing that these adjusted measures have limitations and should be considered alongside audited GAAP figures.

The most recent analyst rating on (VRTS) stock is a Sell with a $128.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Virtus Investment Partners stock, see the VRTS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VRTS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VRTS is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by volatile/negative recent cash flow and weak technical trend signals (price below major moving averages, negative MACD). These are partially offset by attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield) and a mixed-but-stabilizing earnings narrative featuring ETF momentum, cost discipline, and solid liquidity despite continued outflow pressure.

To see Spark’s full report on VRTS stock, click here.

More about Virtus Investment Partners

Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. is a U.S.-based asset management firm that provides investment management and related services. The company has expanded through numerous acquisitions over several years, creating a sizable intangible tax asset that generates meaningful tax benefits tied to goodwill and intangible amortization, which has become increasingly important to its financial profile.

Average Trading Volume: 107,068

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $960.5M

Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd. ( (IGTA) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 14, 2026, Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd. and its merger partner IGTA Merger Sub Limited withdrew their application to list the post-combination PubCo’s securities on Nasdaq in connection with a planned business combination with AgileAlgo Holdings Ltd. The decision leaves Inception Growth’s securities continuing to trade on OTC Markets while the parties evaluate alternative listing venues and other strategic options for the business combination and the combined company’s eventual trading market.

More about Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd.

Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd. is a special purpose acquisition company that seeks to complete business combinations with target businesses through merger and share exchange structures. Its securities are currently traded on OTC Markets Group under existing symbols, where they will remain listed pending any future transaction completion.
